JSW Colouron+

## Beauty that lasts forever

JSW Colouron+ is India’s leading colour-coated steel roofing solution — trusted by homeowners, builders, and contractors alike. Designed using advanced global technology, Colouron+ offers unmatched durability, superior corrosion resistance, and vibrant aesthetics for residential and light commercial roofing.

### Key Features and Benefits

## Defining strength, style and all-weather protection

![15-year warranty](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Frame-24242.svg)

##### 15-year warranty

Guaranteed long-term performance with India’s first anti-fade, anti-peel roofing warranty

![Aluminium-Zinc coating](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Frame-24243.svg)

##### Aluminium-Zinc coating

Advanced Galvalume®
(Al-Zn) coating protects against rust and extreme conditions

![Anti-corrosion](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-15.svg)

##### Anti-corrosion

Anti-corrosion technology prevents steel corrosion, substantially increasing roof life

![All-weather protection](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-16.svg)

##### All-weather protection

Built to withstand heavy rain, salty coastal air, intense heat, and snow

![Optimum temperature management](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Frame-2001.svg)

##### Optimum temperature management

Specialised pigments & SRI technology help reduce heat absorption and improve thermal comfort

![Superior paint technology](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-17.svg)

##### Superior paint technology

High-gloss paint and anti-dust options keep your roof looking vibrant and new with minimal maintenance

![Strength and durability](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-12.svg)

##### Strength and durability

Made from high-tensile pure steel with yield strength of 550–770 MPa for structural reliability

![Advanced technology ](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-14.svg)

##### Advanced technology

Leverages the latest indigenous and international technology for the highest manufacturing quality

![ISI approved](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-13.svg)

##### ISI approved

India’s first ISI-certified colour-coated sheets

![Stringent quality tests](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Frame-24084.svg)

##### Stringent quality tests

Every sheet undergoes 20+ quality tests to ensure performance in real-world conditions

![Color Shade Banner](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/themes/jswcoatedsteeltheme/images/banner-color-shade-bg.jpg)

![](https://www.jswcoatedsteel.in/wp-content/themes/jswcoatedsteeltheme/images/shade-2/profile-1/1.png)

## Technical specifications

- Thickness: 0.20–1.20 mm
- Width: 600–1335 mm
- Substrate: Aluminium–Zinc (Al–Zn) alloy steel
- Coil Form Coating Mass: 70–200 gsm
- Hardness: HRB 55–65 (Soft CQ), 85+ for Grade 80
- Guard Film: Optional 50µ (customisable)
- Standards: ASTM A 755, EN 10169, IS 15965

web.title: The Truth About Metal Roofing Warranties
web.description: Many consumers associate metal roofing warranties with dependability and performance. In reality, this isn't always the case.
web.markdown:
- [Home](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/)
- [Markets](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/markets)
- [Residential](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/residential-metal-roofing)
- Warranties

Residential Resources


# Understanding the Truth Behind Metal Roofing Warranties

## Metal Roof Warranty Overview

Many consumers associate metal roofing warranties with dependability and performance. In reality, this isn’t always the case.

This misconception is due to suppliers in the roofing industry using warranties to sway buyers—when homeowners see the big, flashy term “lifetime warranty,” they rarely read the fine print or take the time to fully understand what that warranty actually covers.

Even though lifetime warranties are quite popular, they simply cannot guarantee that your installed metal roof will last forever. Remember this: an extended warranty doesn’t automatically equal better coverage or higher performing products. The vast majority of industry insiders believe the best performing product for residential applications is a Galvalume steel substrate with a Kynar 500® (PVDF) coating. However, there are many panels with lower quality substrates and coatings that offer longer term warranties.

So, while you’ll likely take warranties into account when selecting a metal panel, it shouldn’t be your only consideration. That being said, while you’re taking the time to review and compare warranties, below are some major factors you should watch out for.

![Kennell Residence Roanoke, IL](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Photo%20Gallery/Residential%20Applications/Kennell%20Residence%20Roanoke%2c%20IL.jpg?width=800&height=422&name=Kennell%20Residence%20Roanoke%2c%20IL.jpg)

## Major Factors You Should Watch Out For:

Length of the Warranty TermSubstrate WarrantyFade/Chalk AllowedFilm Integrity

- Length of the Warranty Term
- Substrate Warranty
- Fade/Chalk Allowed
- Film Integrity

### Length of the Warranty Term

#### Length of the Warranty Term

This is where you should be most cautious, because there are many ways for manufacturers to manipulate this information. One of the most common is prorating the amount of coverage—for example, while the headline reads “Lifetime” or “45 Years,” the fine print and exclusions could reveal your product is actually only warrantied at 20% value within just a few years.

### Substrate Warranty

#### Substrate Warranty

Galvalume® and Galvanized are two commonly used substrates in the metal roofing industry. Galvalume® carries a warranty from the steel mills that protects against perforation (or rust-through) of the substrate, but not surface rust. Galvanized doesn’t include a steel mill warranty, but is still popular for many applications and can perform strongly.

### Fade/Chalk Allowed

#### Fade/Chalk Allowed

Fading occurs when the environment attacks the pigment portion of the coating system. When testing for fade, all chalk and other surface impurities are removed using cheese cloth and detergent, then the test is conducted on the cleaned area. This often results in a denied warranty claim.

Chalking occurs when the environment attacks the resin in the coating system. The resin then takes on a whitish appearance as it degrades, referred to as “chalk.” Again, acceptable levels of failure are built into warranties that can prevent you from making a successful claim

### Film Integrity

#### Film Integrity

Film integrity is the ability of the coating to stay adhered to the metal substrate, and is commonly used in the metal panel industry to extend the length of warranties. For example, a bright red roof could experience severe chalk and/or fade to be a muted pink or white, but the film would still be intact, so a warranty claim would be denied. Film integrity is often the warranty category used for extended life warranties, such as lifetime.

![Roofing-Contract_104278045](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Backgrounds/Roofing-Contract_104278045.png?width=1400&height=788&name=Roofing-Contract_104278045.png)

## The Reality of Metal Roofing

It’s important to keep in mind that warranties are usually written to protect the manufacturer—not the buyer. Therefore, at McElroy Metal, we believe that installed performance is a much more accurate measure of quality than warranties.

That’s why we suggest our customers and dealers always take warranties with a grain of salt. While they may certainly play a factor in your decision-making process, they should never sway it completely.

## So, now that you know the truth behind metal roofing warranties and a little bit more about what they include, here are our recommendations when considering your warranty options for a metal roofing project:

![blue-icon-warranty-1](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hubfs/McElroy%20Metal%20-%20Dec2024/Images/blue-icon-warranty-1.svg)

Ask for a copy of your supplier’s warranty, read it in full, and ask any questions before making a final decision and signing a contract.

![blue-icon-magnifying-glass](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hubfs/McElroy%20Metal%20-%20Dec2024/Images/blue-icon-magnifying-glass.svg)

In the event of a legitimate claim, take a close look at the remedy. The maximum liability for many warranties is limited to only the amount of money paid for the roofing material. No labor or materials!

![blue-icon-performance](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hubfs/McElroy%20Metal%20-%20Dec2024/Images/blue-icon-performance.svg)

Make your purchasing decision based predominantly on panel performance, not warranty.

![blue-icon-roof](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hubfs/McElroy%20Metal%20-%20Dec2024/Images/blue-icon-roof.svg)

For long-term satisfaction with your metal roof, ensure you’re using the best combination of substrate and coatings.

## DOWNLOAD OUR FREE EBOOK

## Residential Metal Roofing Guide

All across the country, homeowners are ditching their shingle roofs and upgrading to metal! While residential metal roofing isn’t new, it is gaining in popularity because more homeowners are recognizing the many environmental and energy-related benefits that metal roofing has to offer.

This eBook was developed to help guide homeowners who have an interest in metal roofing but are seeking a little more knowledge and understanding before finalizing their decision. If that’s your situation, this information is for you.

[Download Now](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=1d82e985-37fb-447e-a88c-e4b884383ef4&signature=AAH58kEMOokEOusDKQ28wghDV1FflAe7jQ&portal_id=4466509&pageId=30395476379&placement_guid=20289153-89c9-4931-8384-994000a9f55a&click=a62f53f3-2c69-41f5-8b3d-2f9032238912&redirect_url=APefjpG8nnUClx1UbkkeysuLsnG0lJctNdGMGH6Oh16ibj0_GrVtm9yDb3BBKt6pLxm87SKQ3kdwBN_G6kqTcdxFfDtGAady9IzNOaZA3YSpKZ0D0qF6uSb9-GJ-VEb7TUnhzTYeszUX7hyuRzssm_YRcF7BjhIg7ZJiRl3g4V1N5j_0bx9jUDhYD3lyX-QfRwjPKmyPpL6P&hsutk=&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mcelroymetal.com%2Fmarkets%2Fresidential%2Fwarranties&ts=1782027535248 "Download Now")

![MCE_012_OFF-Benefits-of-Metal-Roofing-for-Your-Home-Ebook-3D-Cover](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hs-fs/hubfs/McElroy%20Metal%20-%20Dec2024/Images/MCE_012_OFF-Benefits-of-Metal-Roofing-for-Your-Home-Ebook-3D-Cover.png?width=250&height=391&name=MCE_012_OFF-Benefits-of-Metal-Roofing-for-Your-Home-Ebook-3D-Cover.png)

#### Warranty Notes:

- **Customized, job-specific warranties are optional and not required for warranty coverage.**
- The customized warranty process requires you to register using your name and email address. You will receive two emails: one recognizing that you initiated the process and a second with a PDF attachment of your completed warranty.
- Customized warranties include only the colors shown on our [standard color charts](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/metal-roofing/colors).
- Your information will not be shared or sold.

[![Click Here to Download Standard Warranties](https://4466509.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4466509/hub_generated/resized/f66cf445-7b92-47e5-9016-893faa8d1f0b.png)](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=f1d10ffb-1df5-466c-98f3-29c142f15e45&signature=AAH58kE2TnXthOawELRwIGfSrAEzzwTrEA&portal_id=4466509&pageId=30395476379&placement_guid=170f83e0-a9f4-4416-8740-e632e3b6befb&click=47b03eee-ea8a-4f74-9201-7d8ec8384ae2&redirect_url=APefjpE9cTExsJJzKXbANrkhQCqd7L8pztyMwRF10e_aVYajWpPDwuvZ6et1VXq_iO1qLE-lrTsPSktg7P0Whbakw356Hf2wO-zL1_hVlFMGoskBX5Uils0zM6zFPNXuybUmHQ17VfILJzhmgOyINy2ELOoQYn6M7Q&hsutk=&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mcelroymetal.com%2Fmarkets%2Fresidential%2Fwarranties&ts=1782027535274)

[![Complete and Download Project Specific Warranties - Get Started](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hs-fs/hubfs/CTAs/complete-and-download-project-specific-warranties.png?height=200&width=600)](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=687f5d63-0d59-4d63-9f63-0547a820e2e8&signature=AAH58kHV8fNpLACOA6z9YjKXOyB0e1xspw&portal_id=4466509&pageId=30395476379&placement_guid=512f1dcf-5e8b-4048-b481-cf4660cb3de3&click=2dc1e745-e3a5-4920-9e5b-7fff994b1750&redirect_url=APefjpE1Q9GWr-5OxC7KnPajZrXncTsAX0VNWN995_vMmJQ0PiG7Inswf3zm1HbcjbuRB_WNEQoiVE2-aPOWB2KT5iITk4QtOGIBRVdCAiTmTt1yOMQLOFELBk7XHdZ5k-SOLw4jxRf1Ap-5gjFnwIWzTNifKQl_FemGx72d4G-lHj7qNEWIoCQ&hsutk=&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mcelroymetal.com%2Fmarkets%2Fresidential%2Fwarranties&ts=1782027535312)

![map-red](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/hs-fs/hubfs/McElroy%20Metal%20-%20Dec2024/Images/map-red.png?width=936&height=551&name=map-red.png)

## Find a Distributor / Contractor Near You

Whether you’re building a new home or planning renovations, a metal roof can deliver long-term cost savings and comfort. To explore your options and find the product that meets your aesthetic and budgetary needs, [contact a McElroy Metal distributor or contractor](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/find-a-metal-roofing-contractor-or-distributor-near-you) in your area today. We can’t wait to help make your dream home a reality.

[Find a Contractor](https://www.mcelroymetal.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=f568ddff-734f-4597-9da5-4de04ea3f51e&signature=AAH58kH2LMyaxE9sM4SSYRyFUZr01KPZDQ&portal_id=4466509&pageId=30395476379&placement_guid=d2beef62-64fe-4c56-9bb3-f4c70b836bc7&click=1b56fa2c-1876-4381-afec-e0dc3628b244&redirect_url=APefjpE2lWZcSrH8vUu49n7QJ8V0CCslhKoaIGNAm1mRvAftlGvl8G2uwWOC4TYVdNHJlimvLx6jnDpxaibaIw-BG5qhgz2hl_Rw0-rAPxiCIRpLE2_UoNNXoHTO_zwv5GklEzudemXoocjbkqGBSfb5BQt2vfQYQ6zb0ehl4OvGOWLb58IxMM_axQO1EulQOzXl8aB7oCVq&hsutk=&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mcelroymetal.com%2Fmarkets%2Fresidential%2Fwarranties&ts=1782027535279 "Find a Contractor")
